summary: Implemented 5 changes: (1) pipeline stage history accumulation with onStageStart callback in src/pipeline/index.js + server.js + job-store.js, (2) 'submitted' status in pdf_upgrade_queue to distinguish queued-vs-running in src/pdf-upgrade/index.js, (3) rich progress data with elapsed/estimated time in /api/sites/activity endpoint in bin/report-server.js, (4) Upgraded tab filter updated with comment and sort order comment in bin/report-queries.js, (5) rich stage pipeline bar UI with stageLabel/stageProgressText helpers in public/index.html
